title: Medisure Steam Inhaler Cup
features: The Medisure Steam Inhaler is easy and convenient to use, with a non-slip base and two handles to aid use and prevent spillage
It is insulated to help retain heat

Widely used to help clear the airways as warming and moisturising effects help loosen mucus and catarrh

description: Product Description The Medisure Steam Inhaler is easy and convenient to use, with a non-slip base and two handles to aid use and prevent spillage. It is insulated to help retain heat and has a pvc-free nasal mask to aid inhalation. This product is widely used to help clear the airways as its warming and moisturising effects help loosen mucus and catarrh. This helps relieve the symptoms of coughs, colds flu and blocked sinuses. Directions 1. Fill the steamer with water as indicated in tank. 2. Adjust steam settings if available. 3. Position your face over output while avoiding direct contact hot surface. 4. Use for a few minutes, taking breaks needed to avoid discomfort. 5. Repeat process necessary relieve symptoms or regular facial treatments. 6. Always follow safety measures, such use surfaces electrical outlets nearby. Safety Warning Keep the steamer at a safe distance to avoid burns from hot surfaces or steam, follow all electrical safety guidelines, and never leave the device unattended while in operation.
